# Changelog

> Entries older than 60 days are pruned during dream consolidation.

| Date | Author | Change |
|------|--------|--------|
| 2026-04-23 | copilot | **Project snapshot Bicep fix** — Split compute module file names by variant (base vs ACR managed identity vs ACR admin credentials) for ContainerApp/WebApp/FunctionApp so module-file deduplication cannot mix incompatible parameter sets, and hardened cross-config role assignment generation in `MainBicepAssembler` by importing external naming functions and declaring `existing_{resourceGroup}` scopes for external target RGs. Validated against the `fb8699ea` project snapshot reproduction. |
| 2026-04-23 | copilot | **Config-detail Storage first-render fix** — Enriched `GET /resource-group/{id}/resources` with optional lightweight `StorageSubResources` (blob containers, queues, tables) via batched repository reads, and updated `config-detail` to seed its local Storage cache from that first payload instead of fire-and-forget per-account fetches. |
| 2026-04-23 | copilot | **Enterprise app pipeline refactor** — Reworked generated app pipelines for WebApp, ContainerApp, and FunctionApp into a true CI/release split: CI builds once, emits immutable release metadata, scans container images with Trivy, generates a Syft SBOM, and release promotes images across per-environment ACRs with `az acr import` or deploys the same code package artifact without rebuilding. |
| 2026-04-23 | dev | **Resource-edit i18n namespace fix** — Moved the new SqlDatabase labels to the correct `RESOURCE_EDIT.FIELDS.*` namespace (`COLLATION`, `COLLATION_PLACEHOLDER`, `SQL_SERVER`, `MAX_SIZE_GB`) and wired the collation placeholder through translation. Root cause: similarly named labels already existed under `CONFIG_DETAIL.RESOURCES.FORM`, which does not apply to `resource-edit`. |
| 2026-04-23 | dev | **SqlDatabase resource-edit fix** — Added full SqlDatabase support in `resource-edit.component.ts`: `loadResource`, `buildGeneralForm` (sqlServerId + collation), `buildSingleEnvForm` (sku, maxSizeGb, zoneRedundant), `onSave`, `deleteResource`, and `buildSqlDatabaseEnvSettings()`. Also fixed missing `ContainerRegistry` and `SqlServer` cases in `deleteResource()`. Added i18n keys (FR+EN). |
| 2026-04-23 | dev | App pipeline folder duplication fix: the 5 application pipeline generators now emit only relative filenames (`ci.app-pipeline.yml`, `release.app-pipeline.yml`), leaving `AppPipelineGenerationEngine.GenerateAll()` as the sole owner of the `apps/{appName}/...` directory prefix. |
| 2026-04-23 | dev | Refactor `AzureDevOpsGitProviderService.PushScopedFilesAsync`: exact ref name match (refs filter is prefix-only), case-sensitive (Ordinal) path comparisons, listing/probing anchored on resolved parent commit SHA via `versionDescriptor.versionType=commit`, no-op short-circuit when no changes, error logging on push failure. Fixes `BadRequest: path '...' does not exist at commit '...'`. |
| 2026-04-23 | dev | App pipeline path fix: `AppPipelineGenerationEngine` now collapses redundant `apps/{appName}/{resourceName}` nesting when both names are logically identical, and pipeline push handlers normalize legacy duplicated blob paths before Git push so old generated artifacts remain pushable. |
| 2026-04-23 | copilot | **FR ACR i18n fix** — Added the missing `RESOURCE_EDIT.FIELDS.ACR_AUTH_MODE*` keys to `src/Front/public/i18n/fr.json`, fixing raw translation keys in the shared ACR assignment/authentication UI. |
| 2026-04-23 | copilot | **ACR auth mode implementation** — Added shared `AcrAuthMode` support (`ManagedIdentity` / `AdminCredentials`) across backend, EF persistence, contracts, API, Bicep generation, pipeline generation, and Angular create/edit flows for ContainerApp, WebApp, and FunctionApp. |
| 2026-04-23 | copilot | **Environment editor categorization** — Applied `env-extra-section` divider pattern across all 13 resource types in the Environments tab of `resource-edit`. Single-section for simple resources (KeyVault, RedisCache, StorageAccount, AppServicePlan, WebApp, FunctionApp, LogAnalyticsWorkspace, SqlServer), two-section for complex ones (AppConfiguration, ContainerAppEnvironment, ApplicationInsights, CosmosDb, ServiceBusNamespace). Added 38 i18n keys (FR+EN). ContainerApp was already done. EventHubNamespace and ContainerRegistry not in scope. |
| 2026-04-23 | copilot | **Azure DevOps Git new-branch push fix** — `AzureDevOpsGitProviderService` now anchors pushes to a fresh branch on the base branch commit SHA instead of the all-zero sentinel when sending edit/delete changes, fixing ADO `InvalidArgumentValueException` errors such as `The path '...' does not exist at commit ...`. |
| 2026-04-23 | copilot | **Project resource query documentation** — Added architecture documentation for `GET /projects/{id}/resources`, the new keyless SQL read views (`vw_ResourceEnvironmentEntries`, `vw_ChildToParentLinks`), their repository consumers, and the frontend cross-config picker flow. |
| 2026-04-23 | copilot | **ACR Admin Credentials architecture plan** — Produced architect-validated implementation plan for adding username/password ACR authentication mode alongside managed identity on ContainerApp/WebApp/FunctionApp (9 steps, ~46 files, 1 migration). |
| 2026-04-23 | copilot | **Container App environments UX** — Reorganized the ACA environment editor in `resource-edit` into two full-width categories (`Capacity and scaling`, `Ingress and network exposure`) before Health Probes, using lightweight reusable `env-category-section` styling plus FR/EN i18n keys. |
| 2026-04-23 | copilot | **Frontend ACA containerization** — Added `src/Front/Dockerfile`, `src/Front/nginx.conf`, and `src/Front/.dockerignore` for Angular SPA deployment to Azure Container Apps with build-time `API_URL` injection and Nginx SPA fallback on port 8080. |
| 2026-04-23 | copilot | **3 Bicep generation fixes** — (1) Cross-config role assignments: `InfrastructureConfigReadRepository` now pre-loads external target resources so `TargetResourceType`/`TargetResourceName` are never empty for cross-config targets. (2) `SecureParameterOverrideHelper`: param names now include the resource identifier suffix (e.g. `sqlServerIfsAdministratorLoginPassword` instead of `sqlServerAdministratorLoginPassword`). (3) ContainerApp module: extracted `customDomains` for-expression into a variable (BCP138 fix), replaced `union()` with flat object + nullable `customDomains` property (BCP036 fix), removed unused `TransportMethod` import. (4) `BicepFormattingHelper.InferBicepType` now returns `array` for `IList` types. |
| 2026-04-23 | copilot | **Custom Domains V1 — Frontend UX redesign** — Moved custom domains from a dedicated tab to a section within the Environments panel, preselecting the active environment in the dialog and adding an Azure DNS tutorial in the editor flow. |
| 2026-04-23 | copilot | **Bootstrap Azure DevOps — Implementation complete** — Added project-level bootstrap pipeline generation, download, file-content, and push-to-git flows across PipelineGeneration, CQRS, API, contracts, and `project-detail`. |
| 2026-04-23 | copilot | **IsExisting resources** — Added `IsExisting` to `AzureResource`, all 18 concrete resources, generation filters, and corresponding frontend guards/badges. |
| 2026-04-23 | copilot | **SecureParameterMapping** — Added `AzureResource`-level mappings from secure Bicep params to Azure DevOps variable groups, with CQRS/API support, pipeline integration via `SecureParameterOverrideHelper`, and resource-edit UX for SQL Server passwords. |
| 2026-04-22 | copilot | **Custom Domains V1 — Full implementation** — Added `CustomDomain` on `AzureResource`, CQRS CRUD, persistence, API endpoints, Bicep generation for ContainerApp/WebApp/FunctionApp, and frontend management with DNS guidance. |
| 2026-04-22 | copilot | **Custom Domains V1 — Architecture plan** — Defined the shared-domain, CQRS, API, Bicep, and frontend shape for custom domain support on compute resources. |
| 2026-04-22 | copilot | **Bootstrap Azure DevOps hardening** — Bootstrap generation now emits `powershell` steps, ASCII-safe pipeline names, clearer stage/job names, URL-decoded Azure DevOps defaults, fail-fast pipeline creation, idempotent existence checks via `az pipelines list`, and placeholder-safe variable-group provisioning. |
| 2026-04-22 | copilot | **Bootstrap Azure DevOps operator guidance** — Documented the one-time Build Service security prerequisites and rewrote the frontend Bootstrap tab as a unified 10-step guide (Prepare, Run, Permissions, Finalize). |
| 2026-04-22 | copilot | **Bootstrap Azure DevOps scope change** — Removed the generated `Authorize Variable Groups on All Pipelines` step; bootstrap now provisions pipelines and variable groups only, leaving ACL authorization as a manual or admin-driven concern. |
| 2026-04-22 | copilot | **Windows CI `pwsh.exe` fix** — `PipelineGenerationEngine` now emits Azure DevOps `powershell` steps instead of `pwsh` in shared validate/CI/deploy templates for Windows self-hosted agents. |
| 2026-04-22 | copilot | **Frontend favicon refresh** — Replaced the default Angular favicon with branded blue/cyan assets and versioned icon references to break Chrome favicon cache. |
| 2026-04-22 | copilot | **Mono-repo Git push UX** — `project-detail` now exposes a single combined push action that sends Bicep, Pipeline, and Bootstrap artifacts together through `POST /projects/{id}/push-generated-artifacts-to-git`. |
| 2026-04-22 | copilot | **IsExisting generation verification fix** — Lightweight resource-group DTOs now carry `IsExisting`, and project-level generation preflight skips existing resources when checking missing environment configuration. |
| 2026-04-22 | copilot | **Pipeline Variables Tab — 4 fixes** — Project pipeline variable groups now return usage details for app settings, secure parameter mappings, and app configuration keys; frontend loading and filtering were aligned to the current config context. |
| 2026-04-22 | copilot | **Health Probe UI Refactor** — Introduced `ToggleSectionCardComponent` and converted Container App probe configuration to collapsible readiness/liveness/startup sections with defaults. |
| 2026-04-22 | copilot | **ContainerApp Bicep Parameter Grouping** — Refactored 16 flat Container App params into 4 user-defined types and added `ParameterTypeOverrides` plus `ParameterGroupMappings` so env overrides merge into structured objects. |
| 2026-04-22 | copilot | **Container App Health Probes** — Added 6 per-environment probe fields end to end, with validation and conditional Bicep emission. |
| 2026-04-22 | copilot | **Bootstrap Azure DevOps** — Architecture study completed for project-level bootstrap generation, file preview, and Git push flows. |
| 2026-04-22 | copilot | **Security fix** — `ContainerAppEnvironmentTypeBicepGenerator` no longer exposes LAW keys through `listKeys()` and now configures Azure Monitor diagnostics with `workspaceId`. |
| 2026-04-22 | copilot | **Azure DevOps integration boundary** — Documented that runtime Git integration remains Git-only while bootstrap provisioning runs through generated Azure DevOps YAML and CLI automation. |
| 2026-04-22 | copilot | **Name availability** — Switched to DNS-based availability checks, added `current` status handling, and wired async diagnostics plus save-blocking UX in resource editors. |
| 2026-04-22 | copilot | **Resource abbreviation overrides** — Added project- and config-level abbreviation overrides with validation, merged-read precedence, and frontend editing/filtering. |
| 2026-04-22 | copilot | **SqlServer fixes** — Completed SQL Server resource-edit coverage and normalized ARM version handling. |
| 2026-04-22 | copilot | **Bicep deployment fixes** — Added type coercion for env overrides, corrected Container App env var injection placement, and removed the unused CAE `sku` parameter. |
| 2026-04-22 | copilot | **User provisioning** — Moved authenticated-user auto-provisioning into middleware and kept `IUserRepository` read-only. |
| 2026-04-22 | copilot | **Snapshot seeding + Aspire** — Added `scripts/seed-project-snapshot.ps1` for full API-driven project seeding and updated Aspire packages. |
| 2026-04-21 | copilot | **Bicep generation hardening** — Added `SecureParameters`, pipeline override wiring, output symbol validation, LAW fallback logic, artifact path sanitization, and module reference disambiguation. |
| 2026-04-21 | copilot | **Naming constraints + availability** — Added `AzureNamingConstraints`, resource-type-aware validation, and the live name availability endpoint. |
| 2026-04-20 | copilot | **Infra release artifact flow** — Standardized the `drop` artifact flow, artifact-relative paths, release preflight validation, and Bicep-to-JSON compilation. |
| 2026-04-20 | copilot | **Aspire MCP detection trap** — Documented the tooling mismatch where running the AppHost does not always make Aspire MCP resources discoverable. |
| 2026-04-17 | copilot | **`.bicepparam` naming fix** — File names now use environment short names while the internal `environmentName` param keeps the full environment name. |
| 2026-04-16 | copilot | **Bulk platform refactors** — Sealed `EnumValueObject` types, standardized string DTO IDs, enforced `.ProducesProblem(401)`, added tag limits, introduced `RoleAssignmentDomainService`, renamed repository methods, switched Bicep identifiers to camelCase, and aligned ErrorOr handling. |
| 2026-04-16 | copilot | **Aspire decoupling** — Removed Aspire packages from the API and moved DbContext, OTel, and health wiring into Infrastructure DI. |
| 2026-04-15 | copilot | **Main merge + audits** — Merged `main` into the DDD branch, sealed concrete `AzureResource` aggregates, and refreshed the audit automation stack with recreated GitHub audit issues. |
| 2026-04-14 | copilot | **Audit automation** — Added Windows-friendly PowerShell audit entry points, UTF-8 reads, and removed the PowerShell 7 requirement. |
| 2026-04-13 | copilot | **Architecture diagram tooling** — Added the draw.io generator skill and refreshed the architecture diagram. |
| 2026-04-04 | copilot | **Generation/pipeline stabilization** — Fixed Azure DevOps release issues, merged app pipeline generation into `POST /generate-pipeline`, moved `AgentPoolName` to `Project`, refactored `BicepAssembler`, and fixed FK cascade behavior. |
| 2026-04-03 | copilot | **App pipeline generation + GitNexus** — Added app pipeline generation, GitNexus integration, and Container App runtime/pipeline fixes. |
| 2026-04-02 | copilot | **Assign Identity refactor** — Updated the identity assignment flow across domain, CQRS, Bicep, frontend, and diagnostics. |
| 2026-04-01 | copilot | **Windows-first + i18n cleanup** — Reinforced Windows-first conventions and fixed general-config i18n/runtime details. |
| 2026-03-31 | copilot | **EventHubNamespace + config keys UX** — Delivered Event Hub namespace support and redesigned the configuration keys tab. |
| 2026-03-30 | copilot | **ACR + variable groups + UoW** — Added ACR pull role assignments, pipeline variable groups, Unit of Work behavior, and domain quality conventions. |
| 2026-03-29 | copilot | **Azure DevOps pipeline YAML generation** — Added initial pipeline generation support with `AzureResourceManagerConnection`. |
| 2026-03-28 | copilot | **Unified generation UX** — Added unified generation UX, mono-repo pipeline support, secret/static app settings, and the architect agent. |
| 2026-03-27 | copilot | **UAI grouping + storage UX** — Improved UAI grouping and Storage Account CORS/lifecycle editing. |
| 2026-03-26 | copilot | **StorageAccount CORS redesign** — Redesigned Storage Account CORS and queue/table Bicep generation. |
| 2026-03-24 | copilot | **Log Analytics + App Insights** — Delivered Log Analytics Workspace and Application Insights end to end. |
